description: Dowry list of a wealthy bride. The sums given at the bottom are: Muqaddm 20, Mu'khkhar 30 and everything 676 (reading uncertain), meaning that the nedunia is 626. At the bottom of the list is the name Yeshu'a ha-kohen b. Ghulayb. It is not clear whether he is the witness or the groom. This man also appears in ENA 4010.44 [PGPID 2661]. On the other side of the page is a piyyut.
description_he: רשימת נדוניה של כלה עשירה; מוקדם 20 דינרים, מאוחר 30; נדוניה כוללת כ-626 דינרים; ורסו: פיוט
